plugins.name: luly-v0-2-7
plugins.description: Author Luly flows end-to-end from a single natural-language prompt. v0.2.7 adds: product matrix guideline (per-preset controls/tags/quizzes/forms/counts in one place), tags wired through to academy course cards (not flow), logo variants (lockup for header+hub, icon-only for course icon), explicit mobile image-stack order, post-creation controls audit (every screen must have a forward path), and live URL liveness check at assemble time (dead http URLs cleared so renderer falls back to placeholders).
